title: Arthur Jaffe
body: Arthur Michael Jaffe (; born December 22, 1937) is an American mathematical physicist at Harvard University, where in 1985 he succeeded George Mackey as the Landon T. Clay Professor of Mathematics and Theoretical Science.
categories: Academics of the Dublin Institute for Advanced Studies
